title: AI Engine SDK Projection Runtime Platformization

items.description: Capture capability baseline from the working repo example, including template features, transform semantics, and contract wiring behavior.

acceptanceChecks.text: Baseline matrix maps current behavior for each, dot lookup, fallback chains, dataMap mapping, and derive rules.
Known edge cases are documented with expected behavior examples.

items.description: Define reusable SDK projection runtime contract and feature boundaries for loops, nested token resolution, fallback chains, dataMap mapping, and derive evaluation.

acceptanceChecks.text: Runtime contract schema is versioned and documented.
Compatibility guarantees for existing scalar token syntax are declared.

items.description: Define declarative transform schema for template, dataMap, and derive sections including rule precedence and interpolation pipes.

acceptanceChecks.text: Schema supports each loops, fallback chaining, gt comparator, and encode pipe semantics.
Schema validation errors return actionable field-level diagnostics.

items.description: Define compatibility and rollout guardrails to prevent regressions for existing consumers during runtime platformization.

acceptanceChecks.text: Compatibility contract includes explicit no-break guarantees for existing scalar token behavior.
Feature flags or staged rollout controls are defined for runtime adoption.

items.description: Implement core token resolver behavior for nested lookup and fallback chain semantics.

acceptanceChecks.text: Resolver supports arbitrary-depth dot notation token access.
Fallback chains resolve first non-empty value deterministically.

items.description: Implement collection iteration support for each blocks within the shared template runtime.

acceptanceChecks.text: Each renderer expands list entries in stable source order.
Each renderer supports nested token substitution in item scope.

items.description: Implement dataMap application and filtering behavior including string matches and gt comparisons.

acceptanceChecks.text: dataMap maps scalar and collection sources into token payloads.
Filter engine supports array includes and gt comparison semantics.

items.description: Implement derive evaluation for ordered rules and template interpolation with encode pipe support.

acceptanceChecks.text: Rule chains evaluate in priority order with default fallback.
Template interpolation supports encode pipe for URL-safe output.

items.description: Implement shared SDK runtime for template rendering, token resolution, dataMap processing, and derive evaluation.

acceptanceChecks.text: SDK runtime executes declarative contracts without app-specific transform code.
Parity tests pass for the declarative portfolio projection reference.

items.description: Wire the new shared runtime into operator projection flows to remove app-specific transform logic where contracts exist.

acceptanceChecks.text: Portfolio projection resolves via contract runtime path without bespoke transform logic.
Legacy fallback behavior remains functional for non-migrated projections.

items.description: Integrate backend platform transform execution surfaces with governed projection metadata and provenance outputs.

acceptanceChecks.text: Backend transform endpoints return contract metadata and provenance fields consistently.
Error responses include actionable transform validation details instead of opaque failures.

items.description: Stabilize charter/roadmap mutation surfaces and runtime query dependencies required for project bootstrap and packet import.

acceptanceChecks.text: Missing runtime query contract blocker is resolved for project bootstrap flow.
Charter and roadmap creation endpoints complete without HTTP 500 responses in integration tests.

items.description: Build unit test coverage for resolver, each rendering, dataMap filtering, and derive rule behavior.

acceptanceChecks.text: Unit tests cover positive and negative cases for all runtime primitives.
Test fixtures include real-world examples from the working portfolio projection.

items.description: Establish parity verification for loops, fallback chains, derive rules, and output shape between legacy runtime and SDK runtime.

acceptanceChecks.text: Parity suite passes for pilot projection outputs and metadata.
Snapshot comparison validates markdown output equivalence for reference projections.

items.description: Verify backend responses publish required projection metadata and provenance contract fields.

acceptanceChecks.text: Responses include loga contract headers, projection type, source truth, and correlation metadata.
Contract validation tests fail fast when metadata fields are missing.

items.description: Publish migration guidance and onboard at least two application consumers to the SDK runtime.

acceptanceChecks.text: At least two applications adopt the shared runtime without app-local transform logic.
Migration runbook includes rollback and feature-flag guidance.
